race.comment: JUDITH'S REVENGE (3) had been in great form winning two on end before finishing second last time here over 1000m. Steps back out to a winning trip and can easily atone. LA MER BLEUE (2) again showed good early speed when leading at Goulburn, only to be gunned down on the post. Strips fitter third-up and is sure to give another bold sight. GO COMMANDO (6) will strip fitter for this after running below expectations first-up at Goulburn. Much better than that and gets the key booking of Boudvillain. Sharp improvement anticipated. TJAKA (7) will relish the hot tempo and can give them a scare late if they overcook it in front. Don't take lightly.
